name_en: In Stock 24S Mini Bag King (31 Ultra Mini Nano)
name_cn:
In Stock 24S Mini Bag King (31 Ultra Mini Nano)
A must-have for summer, you won't regret it!!
Leather: Italian bonaudo
Hardware: Original factory plated 24K light gold
Size: 12*13*4Cm (Note: Cannot fit a phone. If you need to carry a phone, cosmetics, or daily essentials, please check other styles. This style is for display and matching; those who can carry this are basically little princesses...) 99350
